title: Build imux interactive multiplexer MVP
description: Track the initial build of imux as an interactive multiplexer, including core process lifecycle control, live terminal UI, dynamic process management, and process inspection capabilities.
acceptance: Epic remains open until MVP child issues are implemented and reviewed

description.new: Track the initial build of imux as an interactive multiplexer, including core process lifecycle control, live terminal UI, dynamic process management, and process inspection capabilities.

acceptance.new: Epic remains open until MVP child issues are implemented and reviewed

title: Build imux interactive multiplexer MVP
Define imux architecture and process model
description: Define core architecture for imux: supervisor model, process abstraction, event bus, state store, and boundaries between backend process control and TUI rendering.
acceptance: Failure-handling and restart policy semantics are specified

acceptance.new: Failure-handling and restart policy semantics are specified

title.new: Define imux architecture and process model

description.new: Define core architecture for imux: supervisor model, process abstraction, event bus, state store, and boundaries between backend process control and TUI rendering.

title: Define imux architecture and process model
Build alt-screen TUI shell and layout
description: Implement Bubble Tea alt-screen application shell with panes for process list, selected process output, and inspector panel placeholders.
acceptance: UI state is driven by central model, not ad-hoc globals

description.new: Implement Bubble Tea alt-screen application shell with panes for process list, selected process output, and inspector panel placeholders.

title.new: Build alt-screen TUI shell and layout

acceptance.new: UI state is driven by central model, not ad-hoc globals

title: Build alt-screen TUI shell and layout
Implement process lifecycle controls
description: Implement per-process controls: pause, continue, kill, and restart, with consistent state transitions and user-visible outcomes.
acceptance: Errors are surfaced in UI and logs with actionable messages

description.new: Implement per-process controls: pause, continue, kill, and restart, with consistent state transitions and user-visible outcomes.

acceptance.new: Errors are surfaced in UI and logs with actionable messages

title: Implement process lifecycle controls
Support dynamic process creation from UI
description: Allow users to start new processes at runtime that were not specified on the initial command line, including command entry, validation, and attachment to supervisor state.
acceptance: Spawn failures are handled without destabilizing running sessions

acceptance.new: Spawn failures are handled without destabilizing running sessions

description.new: Allow users to start new processes at runtime that were not specified on the initial command line, including command entry, validation, and attachment to supervisor state.

title.new: Support dynamic process creation from UI

title: Support dynamic process creation from UI
Add process inspection capabilities
description: Implement per-process inspection for process tree, CPU and memory usage, and open ports, with refresh behavior suitable for interactive use.
acceptance: Platform-specific limitations are documented and handled gracefully

description.new: Implement per-process inspection for process tree, CPU and memory usage, and open ports, with refresh behavior suitable for interactive use.

acceptance.new: Platform-specific limitations are documented and handled gracefully

title: Add process inspection capabilities
Define MVP test matrix and reliability checks
description: Define and implement test coverage for imux MVP flows: startup, control actions, dynamic spawn, inspector behavior, and recovery from child process failures.
acceptance: Known reliability risks and follow-up issues are documented

acceptance.new: Known reliability risks and follow-up issues are documented

title.new: Define MVP test matrix and reliability checks

description.new: Define and implement test coverage for imux MVP flows: startup, control actions, dynamic spawn, inspector behavior, and recovery from child process failures.

title: Define MVP test matrix and reliability checks
Define imux architecture and process model
description: Define core architecture for imux: supervisor model, process abstraction, event bus, state store, CLI entrypoint design, and boundaries between backend process control and TUI rendering. The CLI must use spf13/cobra for argument parsing and command structure.
acceptance: Failure-handling and restart policy semantics are specified

title: Build imux interactive multiplexer MVP
Define imux architecture and process model
description: Define core architecture for imux: supervisor model, process abstraction, event bus, state store, CLI entrypoint design, and boundaries between backend process control and TUI rendering. The CLI must use spf13/cobra for argument parsing and command structure, and should provide ergonomic single-letter top-level commands/aliases for tmux-heavy workflows.
acceptance: Failure-handling and restart policy semantics are specified

description.old: Define core architecture for imux: supervisor model, process abstraction, event bus, state store, CLI entrypoint design, and boundaries between backend process control and TUI rendering. The CLI must use spf13/cobra for argument parsing and command structure.
description.new: Define core architecture for imux: supervisor model, process abstraction, event bus, state store, CLI entrypoint design, and boundaries between backend process control and TUI rendering. The CLI must use spf13/cobra for argument parsing and command structure, and should provide ergonomic single-letter top-level commands/aliases for tmux-heavy workflows.

title: Define imux architecture and process model
Build imux interactive multiplexer MVP
description: Track the initial build of imux as an interactive multiplexer, including core process lifecycle control, live terminal UI, dynamic process management, and process inspection capabilities.
acceptance: Epic remains open until MVP child issues are implemented and reviewed
notes: Constraints: use spf13/cobra for CLI argument parsing and command tree; provide single-letter commands/aliases where practical to reduce collisions and friction in tmux-like environments.

notes.old: Constraint: use spf13/cobra for CLI argument parsing and command tree.
notes.new: Constraints: use spf13/cobra for CLI argument parsing and command tree; provide single-letter commands/aliases where practical to reduce collisions and friction in tmux-like environments.

title: Build imux interactive multiplexer MVP
Implement output multiplexing with stream-aware logging
description: Build output multiplexing for managed processes with optional logging to file. Preserve stream identity so stdout and stderr are differentiated in UI and log output, instead of merged text streams.
acceptance: Log format supports reliable replay/parsing without losing ordering context

acceptance.new: Log format supports reliable replay/parsing without losing ordering context

description.new: Build output multiplexing for managed processes with optional logging to file. Preserve stream identity so stdout and stderr are differentiated in UI and log output, instead of merged text streams.

title.new: Implement output multiplexing with stream-aware logging

title: Implement output multiplexing with stream-aware logging
Build imux interactive multiplexer MVP
description: Track the initial build of imux as an interactive multiplexer, including core process lifecycle control, live terminal UI, dynamic process management, and process inspection capabilities.
acceptance: Epic remains open until MVP child issues are implemented and reviewed
notes: Constraints: use spf13/cobra for CLI argument parsing and command tree; provide single-letter commands/aliases where practical to reduce collisions and friction in tmux-like environments; implement output multiplexing with optional file logging and explicit stdout/stderr differentiation.

notes.old: Constraints: use spf13/cobra for CLI argument parsing and command tree; provide single-letter commands/aliases where practical to reduce collisions and friction in tmux-like environments.
notes.new: Constraints: use spf13/cobra for CLI argument parsing and command tree; provide single-letter commands/aliases where practical to reduce collisions and friction in tmux-like environments; implement output multiplexing with optional file logging and explicit stdout/stderr differentiation.

title: Build imux interactive multiplexer MVP
Implement output multiplexing with stream-aware logging
description: Build output multiplexing for managed processes with optional logging to file. Use a single merged output stream/log while preserving source identity so stdout and stderr are explicitly differentiated on every emitted line/event.
acceptance: Marker format is simple and ergonomic (e.g., o/e prefix), finalized during implementation

description.old: Build output multiplexing for managed processes with optional logging to file. Preserve stream identity so stdout and stderr are differentiated in UI and log output, instead of merged text streams.
description.new: Build output multiplexing for managed processes with optional logging to file. Use a single merged output stream/log while preserving source identity so stdout and stderr are explicitly differentiated on every emitted line/event.

acceptance.old: Log format supports reliable replay/parsing without losing ordering context
acceptance.new: Marker format is simple and ergonomic (e.g., o/e prefix), finalized during implementation

title: Implement output multiplexing with stream-aware logging
